scripts.build: pnpm --filter @cchistory/domain build && pnpm --filter @cchistory/canonical build && pnpm --filter @cchistory/source-adapters build && pnpm --filter @cchistory/live-runtime build && pnpm --filter @cchistory/storage build && pnpm --filter @cchistory/api-client build && pnpm --filter @cchistory/presentation build && pnpm --filter @cchistory/tui build && pnpm --filter @cchistory/cli build && pnpm --filter @cchistory/lite-cli build && pnpm --filter @cchistory/lite-tui build && pnpm --filter @cchistory/api build
scripts.build:all:safe: pnpm run build && NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=1536 pnpm --filter @cchistory/web build
scripts.cli:link: pnpm --filter @cchistory/cli build && cd apps/cli && npm link
scripts.lite:link: pnpm --filter @cchistory/lite-cli build && cd apps/lite-cli && npm link
scripts.lite:tui:link: pnpm --filter @cchistory/lite-tui build && cd apps/lite-tui && npm link
scripts.verify:lite: pnpm --filter @cchistory/canonical test && pnpm --filter @cchistory/live-runtime test && pnpm --filter @cchistory/lite-cli test && pnpm --filter @cchistory/lite-tui test && node scripts/verify-lite-boundaries.mjs
scripts.verify:v1-seeded-acceptance: pnpm --filter @cchistory/api build && pnpm --filter @cchistory/cli build && pnpm --filter @cchistory/tui build && node scripts/verify-v1-seeded-acceptance.mjs
scripts.verify:read-only-admin: pnpm --filter @cchistory/api build && pnpm --filter @cchistory/cli build && pnpm --filter @cchistory/tui build && node scripts/verify-read-only-admin.mjs
scripts.verify:fixture-sync-recall: pnpm --filter @cchistory/api build && pnpm --filter @cchistory/cli build && pnpm --filter @cchistory/tui build && node scripts/verify-fixture-sync-to-recall.mjs
scripts.verify:real-layout-sync-recall: pnpm --filter @cchistory/api build && pnpm --filter @cchistory/cli build && pnpm --filter @cchistory/tui build && node scripts/verify-real-layout-sync-recall.mjs
scripts.verify:related-work-recall: pnpm --filter @cchistory/api build && pnpm --filter @cchistory/cli build && pnpm --filter @cchistory/tui build && node --import ./scripts/install-node-sqlite-warning-filter.mjs scripts/verify-related-work-recall.mjs
scripts.verify:cli-tui-read-side: pnpm --filter @cchistory/cli test && pnpm --filter @cchistory/tui test:state && pnpm --filter @cchistory/tui test:layout && pnpm --filter @cchistory/api build && pnpm run test:e2e && node --import ./scripts/install-node-sqlite-warning-filter.mjs scripts/verify-skeptical-browse-search.mjs && node --import ./scripts/install-node-sqlite-warning-filter.mjs scripts/verify-real-layout-sync-recall.mjs
scripts.prepare:v1-seeded-web-review: pnpm --filter @cchistory/api build && pnpm --filter @cchistory/cli build && pnpm --filter @cchistory/tui build && node scripts/verify-v1-seeded-acceptance.mjs --materialize-only
scripts.probe:smoke: pnpm --filter @cchistory/domain build && pnpm --filter @cchistory/source-adapters build && node scripts/probe-smoke.mjs
scripts.validate:core: pnpm --filter @cchistory/domain test && pnpm --filter @cchistory/canonical test && pnpm --filter @cchistory/source-adapters test && pnpm --filter @cchistory/live-runtime test && pnpm --filter @cchistory/storage test && pnpm --filter @cchistory/cli test && pnpm --filter @cchistory/lite-cli test && pnpm --filter @cchistory/lite-tui test && pnpm --filter @cchistory/api test
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @cchistory/domain test && pnpm --filter @cchistory/canonical test && pnpm --filter @cchistory/source-adapters test && pnpm --filter @cchistory/live-runtime test && pnpm --filter @cchistory/storage test && pnpm --filter @cchistory/presentation test && pnpm --filter @cchistory/api-client test && pnpm --filter @cchistory/cli test && pnpm --filter @cchistory/tui test && pnpm --filter @cchistory/lite-cli test && pnpm --filter @cchistory/lite-tui test && pnpm --filter @cchistory/api test
scripts.test:core: pnpm --filter @cchistory/canonical test && pnpm --filter @cchistory/source-adapters test && pnpm --filter @cchistory/live-runtime test && pnpm --filter @cchistory/storage test
